Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to take an initial DECLARE model for a loan application review process and add new constraints to mitigate bias related to sensitive attributes ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace I need to preserve the Python dictionary format and provide rationale

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Let me first understand the given model existence StartApplication FinalDecision absence exactly_one init StartApplication responded_existence coexistence StartApplication FinalDecision response StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo precedence succession RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision altresponse altprecedence altsuccession chainresponse chainprecedence chainsuccession noncoexistence nonsuccession nonchainsuccession

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now I need to add constraints that limit bias The prompt gives examples Coexistence If a decision step occurs for sensitive applicant eg Approve_Minority or Reject_Minority ensure ManualReview coexists Response Succession Ensure decision steps Approve Reject cannot immediately follow activity disclosing sensitive attributes eg CheckApplicantRace without first performing BiasMitigationCheck Non succession Prevent direct succession from sensitive attribute event CheckApplicantRace to decision event Reject

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Since the prompt asks to introduce constraints that ensure I should add activities that are relevant to the bias mitigation narrative even if they werent in the original model because the constraints reference them

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me design a coherent set of added constraints Activities to reference CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Approve Reject Approve_Minority Reject_Minority

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantGender to BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantAge to BiasMitigationCheck This ensures that if a sensitive attribute is checked a bias mitigation check must eventually follow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Precedence BiasMitigationCheck to Reject BiasMitigationCheck to Approve BiasMitigationCheck to Reject_Minority BiasMitigationCheck to Approve_Minority This ensures that the decision is preceded by the mitigation check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Non succession Prevent direct succession from CheckApplicantRace to Reject and other sensitive checks to decisions This is exactly what the prompt suggests

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Plan for additions Existence add ManualReview and BiasMitigationCheck Coexistence add pairs for sensitive decisions and manual review Response add from sensitive checks to mitigation check Precedence add mitigation check before decisions Non succession prevent direct succession from sensitive check to decision Non chain succession same but immediate adjacency

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I need to make sure the dictionary format is exactly right For binary constraints in the example response maps source activity to target activity with support and confidence Thus for precedence if I want BiasMitigationCheck to Reject it should be precedence BiasMitigationCheck Reject

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This looks good check consistency The precedence dictionary has BiasMitigationCheck mapping to four targets valid The succession dictionary has sensitive checks mapping to BiasMitigationCheck valid The nonsuccession has the sensitive checks mapping to decision targets valid

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rationale Existence of ManualReview and BiasMitigationCheck ensures these fairness steps are always present Coexistence of Reject_Minority and Approve_Minority with ManualReview means if a decision is made for a minority applicant a manual review must also occur Response from sensitive checks to BiasMitigationCheck ensures no decision proceeds without review Precedence from BiasMitigationCheck to decisions means any decision can only occur after a bias mitigation check Non succession and non chain succession block direct or immediate biased transitions
